capability_plan.action: Balance async/thread/process lanes by workload shape.
Strengthen module contracts and discovery validation.
Expand connector orchestration to leverage high-value multi-source collectors safely.
Improve indexed storage for historical correlation replay.
Extend TTL-aware cache layers for expensive enrichment calls.
Expand analyst outputs with richer graph/report artifacts.
Close regression gaps around failure paths and adapters.

recommended_plugins.title: Account Recovery Exposure Probe
recommended_plugins.description: Measures how much account-recovery metadata is publicly exposed across discovered profiles.

recommended_plugins.title: Contact Ember Analyzer
recommended_plugins.description: Correlates exposed emails/phones across platforms and calculates contact mesh density.

recommended_plugins.title: Cross-Platform Activity Timeline
recommended_plugins.description: Extracts public date hints across profiles to build a lightweight activity timeline.

recommended_plugins.title: AES Attachment Cipher
recommended_plugins.description: Encrypts or decrypts attachment-like text payloads using AES-CFB.

recommended_plugins.title: ROT13 Attachment Cipher
recommended_plugins.description: Applies ROT13 transform on attachment-like payloads for reversible text masking.

recommended_plugins.title: XOR Attachment Cipher
recommended_plugins.description: Applies XOR transform on attachment-like payloads for reversible obfuscation.

recommended_plugins.title: Darkweb Tor Intelligence
recommended_plugins.description: Collects passive onion references and Tor-aware Ahmia search hints from public investigation context.

recommended_plugins.title: Email Pattern Inference
recommended_plugins.description: Infers possible corporate mailbox formats from usernames and target domain artifacts.

recommended_plugins.title: Entity Link Intelligence
recommended_plugins.description: Follows public bio/entity links in a controlled depth-limited way for deeper public-context gathering.

recommended_plugins.title: Header Hardening Probe
recommended_plugins.description: Performs deep security-header assessment on target HTTPS response headers.

recommended_plugins.title: Identity Fusion Core
recommended_plugins.description: Aggregates confidence, mention density, and identity overlaps into a fusion index.

recommended_plugins.title: Link Outbound Risk Profiler
recommended_plugins.description: Classifies discovered outbound links by trust, transport security, and suspicious sharing patterns.

recommended_plugins.title: Media Intelligence Core
recommended_plugins.description: Extracts public image metadata and optional OCR text from profile-linked media.

recommended_plugins.title: Media Recon Engine
recommended_plugins.description: Runs public image, thumbnail, video-endpoint, and post-text reconnaissance for profile intelligence.

recommended_plugins.title: media_recon_shared
recommended_plugins.description: No description provided.

recommended_plugins.title: Module Capability Matrix
recommended_plugins.description: Maps plugin-like module signals from source-intel trees into scope-aware insights.

recommended_plugins.title: Orbit Link Matrix
recommended_plugins.description: Builds platform-to-domain linkage and shared outbound domain signals.

recommended_plugins.title: Post Signal Intelligence
recommended_plugins.description: Extracts OSINT cues from public profile and post-like text fragments harvested during profile scans.

recommended_plugins.title: RDAP Lifecycle Inspector
recommended_plugins.description: Evaluates RDAP status, nameserver metadata, and change recency to surface domain governance risk.

recommended_plugins.title: Signal Fusion Core
recommended_plugins.description: Runs internal connector lanes and merges normalized signals into silinosic_x workflows.

recommended_plugins.title: Stego Signal Probe
recommended_plugins.description: Scores public image assets for lightweight stego-suspicion indicators such as entropy and container density.

recommended_plugins.title: Subdomain Risk Atlas
recommended_plugins.description: Classifies discovered subdomains by environment and high-risk naming patterns.

recommended_plugins.title: Surface Transport Stability Probe
recommended_plugins.description: Scores transport availability, redirect posture, and probe failures for domain surface resilience.

recommended_plugins.title: Threat Conductor
recommended_plugins.description: Combines correlation, issue distribution, and scan quality into an executive risk signal.

recommended_plugins.title: Username Impersonation Probe
recommended_plugins.description: Detects high-similarity username variants in mentions and profile artifacts that may indicate impersonation.
